name: Valuence Merger Corp. I
summary: . Introduction The Company is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on August 27, 2021. The Company was incorporated for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities (a Business Combination). The Company is not limited to a particular industry or sector for purposes of consummating a Business Combination. However, the Company intends to...
